title: Space and Beyond!
description: This modpack is a space specific progression with new ores and items to complement it!
body:
This modpack is a work in progress but currently adds a few main things:
- Space and space exploration
  - Space ships, ores and some other space tech that will make the game harder and more enjoyable
- Wormholes
  - Portals that let you travel any distance in an instant

Currently I am hoping to add planes, blimps, cannons and lasers.
Other than those Items I think that more tech and ores would make this more enjoyable along with structures in space and on earth. I might even add some Gurren lagann stuff just for the love of the game.

Overall this modpack is meant as a space exploration and space adventure modpack that will allow you to chase the sky and drill your way into the heavens!

To support me or to get mod support:

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix

Support Server: https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt

Mods included currently:
- Iris Shaders - coderbot
- ImmediatelyFast - RaphiMC
- Potentials - Fej1Fun
- Sodium - CaffeineMC
- Stellaris - The Exodus Team
- Wormhole (Portals) - SuperMartijn642
